title: Create: Numismatics
description: Aesthetic & Functional Create styled currency mod
body:
### Need a server host? We personally recommend Bloom Host! Grab a server [here](https://billing.bloom.host/aff.php?aff=17)! [![bloom-gif](https://bloom.host/assets/images/Comp_2.gif)](https://billing.bloom.host/aff.php?aff=17) [![discord-plural](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/social/discord-plural_vector.svg)](https://discord.gg/md78MGbEfK) # Create: Numismatics Numismatics is a brand-new currency mod that boasts easy-to-use systems for simple shops as well as leaving room for your wildest redstone-capitalism dreams. ## Features ### Vendor Quick buying or selling of items, designed for compact player-run shops. Creative version allows server admins to setup infinitely-refilling shops.
### Bank Terminal Access your virtual bank account to deposit and withdraw coins.
### Depositor Set a price and the depositor will emit a 1 redstone tick pulse once a player deposits money, either by having coins in their inventory or by using a card.
### Coins The backbone of the mod, with 6 different coins of various values to choose from. | Spur | Bevel | Sprocket | Cog | Crown | Sun | | ------ | ------- | -------- | -------- | ------ | ------- | | 1 spur | 8 spurs | 16 spurs | 64 spurs | 8 cogs | 64 cogs | | ![Spur](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Layers-of-Railways/ImageDump/main/numismatics/spur.png) | ![Bevel](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Layers-of-Railways/ImageDump/main/numismatics/bevel.png) | ![Sprocket](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Layers-of-Railways/ImageDump/main/numismatics/sprocket.png) | ![Cog](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Layers-of-Railways/ImageDump/main/numismatics/cog.png) | ![Crown](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Layers-of-Railways/ImageDump/main/numismatics/crown.png) | ![Sun](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Layers-of-Railways/ImageDump/main/numismatics/sun.png) |
### Bank and ID Cards Bank Cards can be placed in a Depositor or Vendor to have funds go directly into the associated account. Additionally, using a Bank Card on a Vendor or Depositor extracts funds from your account instead of taking coins from your inventory. ID Cards are used to allow other players access to Numismatics' protected blocks (Vendors, Depositors, and Blaze Bankers), allowing you to easily give access to your business partners.
### Blaze Banker Is one bank account not enough for your ~~tax evasion~~ business needs? Create another and use ID Cards to allow your business partners to withdraw funds.
